Off Calendar Jan-18-2005 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Jan-18-2005 Case Settled - Set For Crc 525 Hearing On Apr-05-05 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: This matter came regularly on calendar this day, by assignment from the Department of the Presiding Judge for settlement on the record.
Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Tony Vaughn.
Bruce Prescott, Esq. for Plaintiff: Annie Z. Ho, also present.
Luan Le, Esq. for Defendants: Ming Ze, Inc. and Fei Li, present with Mandarin Interpreter: Teresa Wong.
Marc Voisenat, Esq. for Cross-Defendant: Victor So aka Yai Wan So, present.
Parties settled, terms read into the record as follows:
Dismissal as to Complaint and Cross-Complaint by the parties, full mutual releases, own costs and fees, terms of settlement will be kept confidential.
Mr. Le to compromised and seeks approval from Bankruptcy's Court as to the Corp. Defendant.
Parties agreed to terms in open court, matter is placed on the CRC-225 calendar in Dept. 212 on April 5, 2005 at 10:00 A.M., for DISMISSAL as to the Complaint and Cross-Complaint.
